name: funel-suite
description: Plateforme de pilotage de la sous-location courte durée — FUNEL suite (Cloudflare Worker + D1)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,yellow "wrangler dev --port 8787" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.deploy: npm run build -w client && wrangler deploy
scripts.db:setup:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply funel-suite-db --local && wrangler d1 execute funel-suite-db --local --file=./server/seed.sql
scripts.db:setup:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply funel-suite-db --remote && wrangler d1 execute funel-suite-db --remote --file=./server/seed.sql
